$comment: Machine-readable scanner-rule constraints, served to agents via the MCP get_usage_rules tool and the llms.txt corpus. R1–R8 and R10 are defined in GOV-DS-2026-02 (v4.3) §10, whose canonical running text is the approval-tracked artefact, not vendored in this repo — their entries carry the canonical pointer rather than re-stated (possibly drifted) prose. R9/R11 are restated here from in-repo docs; R12–R14 are new in v4.4 (GOV-DS-2026-02 rev. v4.4 §9; renumbered from the brief's R11–R13 — see §13 decision 2026-06-09·2).

Token-tier discipline: component code consumes only semantic or component-tier tokens — never raw hex/RGB literals and never primitive-tier tokens (color.palette.*, color.brand.*, color.neutral.*) directly.
rules.instead: Use the semantic chain (e.g. var(--color-action-primary), var(--color-chart-cat-1)); request a new semantic token if no role fits.

rules.description: Defined in the v4.3 canonical document (consumer scanners carry the implementation).

iris.accent-on contrast guard: white text on an iris.accent surface computes to 3.74:1 (AA Large + Non-Text only). Small text (below 18.66px bold / 24px regular) using iris.accent-on on iris.accent violates.
rules.instead: Use iris.accent-on-dark (stone-900, AA-Normal-safe) for body-sized text on iris.accent, or qualify for AA Large.

rules.description: Token source hygiene (v4.4; the brief's "R11", renumbered): tokens/** must pass DTCG 2025.10 validation (.tokens.json extension, $value/$type/$description, valid $deprecated); color $values must be OKLCH (no raw hex); the dark theme set may not leave any semantic/component color token resolving to its light value without an explicit themeInvariant reason.
rules.instead: Run npm run lint:tokens (reference implementation: tools/tokens-build/lint.js); convert hex with tools/tokens-build/lib/oklch.js; add dark overrides to tokens/themes/dark.tokens.json.

rules.description: Motion gating (v4.4; the brief's "R12", renumbered): animated CSS in component-tier code must be gated on [data-motion] or prefers-reduced-motion (or the useReducedMotion() hook). Raw ungated infinite animation: or transition: longer than 500ms violates.
rules.instead: Gate with useReducedMotion() / motion-reduce: classes / the central [data-motion="reduced"] rules in tokens.css; reference implementation scripts/scanner-rules/r13-motion-gating.mjs.

rules.description: Agent-surface freshness (v4.4; the brief's "R13", renumbered): public/agent/registry.json, the llms.txt family and the per-page .md mirrors must be regenerated in the same commit as any change to component types, tokens, recipes, lifecycle, showcase entries or scanner rules.
rules.instead: Run npm run build:agent-surface and commit the regenerated public/ artefacts; CI runs npm run agent:check (same drift mechanism as docs:check).
